indicators.name: Evidence Coverage
indicators.detail: Claim #3 (simplicity) is not backed by evidence and is often contested.

indicators.name: Source Reliability
indicators.detail: Input document is a well-structured ADR draft.

indicators.name: Governance Alignment
indicators.detail: Overbroad decision may conflict with MVP speed requirements.

summary: The proposal is architecturally sound but may be over-engineered for the current phase. Narrowing the scope to an append-only audit log is recommended.
